status.sql: SELECT "feature_type", SUM(ST_LENGTH("geometry")) AS "total_length" FROM "GEO_OPENSTREETMAP"."PLANET_FEATURES" WHERE ST_DWITHIN("geometry", (SELECT "geometry" FROM "GEO_OPENSTREETMAP"."PLANET_FEATURES" WHERE "osm_id" = 'Q35'), 0) GROUP BY "feature_type" ORDER BY "total_length" DESC LIMIT 5;
